pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language rules, preventing the use of Java 17 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 17-specific libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is no longer available in the default classpath in Java 17; using the Jakarta namespace is required for modern compatibility and to avoid missing class errors if the old javax dependency is not explicitly provided or if the codebase migrates to Jakarta imports.

src/main/java/s08/Checker.java.general_idea: Add import for the java.io.Serial annotation introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/s08/Checker.java.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is used in the code but not imported, causing a compilation error on Java 17.
